description: Fetch example.com via the web_fetch tool and report title/body summary (covers the non-CLI toolchain)

turns.user: Please fetch https://example.com and tell me the page's main heading and what the body says.

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent invokes the `web_fetch` tool (url=https://example.com) and reports based on the fetched content
expectations.overall: Response must contain the "Example Domain" heading or equivalent; no fabrication
